title: said differently

chunks.content:
Article: said differently
[]: said differently Post by Sachi » Mon May 14, 2007 12:23 am well, im pretty sure that this has been discussed before, but how come in EoE, they pronounce "Eva" differently than in the series series= "AAVA" Eoe= "EEVA"

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Mon May 14, 2007 12:32 am It's because Amanda Winn Lee is a horrible director, and didn't bother to learn how words/syllables are pronounced in the Japanese language.

[]: Post by slothen » Mon May 14, 2007 1:09 am if we're talking about dubs, the EoE dubs are significantly poorer in quality that the directors cut dubs or even any of the versions in the series.

[]: Re: said differently Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 14, 2007 1:17 am Sachiel_13 wrote: well, im pretty sure that this has been discussed before, but how come in EoE, they pronounce "Eva" differently than in the series series= "AAVA" Eoe= "EEVA"
